name: Breakfast Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE all ingredients except butter.
2. If using a meat grinder, fit it with a medium die.
3. If using a food processor, put only a small quantity in the work bowl at a time and pulse carefully so the mixture doesn't turn into a paste.
4. Repeat until all mixture is ground; then mix the separate batches together well.
5. Form the ground meat into patties.
6. To cook the sausage, melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat on the stove and cook the patties 2-to-3 minutes on each side.
7. Makes 12 to 16 Patties
